creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
(In reply to Vladimir Krstulja from comment #2)
> I'm curious, why add a subdomain and whole new master site instead of an
> AAAA record on bsdforge.com?

Fair question. I would have asked the same. :)
I did that. But I found the web server (Apache) isn't
responding correctly. So I'm just going to dump Apache
for nginx, where I'll have better control.

Thanks Vladimir!

--Chris
